mapper.select: SELECT * FROM base_product WHERE product_code = #{code} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM base_product WHERE barcode = #{barcode} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM base_product WHERE product_code = #{code} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM base_product WHERE barcode = #{barcode} AND barcode IS NOT NULL AND barcode != '' LIMIT 1

SELECT warehouse_id AS warehouseId, warehouse_name AS warehouseName, SUM(qty) AS qty, SUM(available_qty) AS availableQty, SUM(total_cost) AS totalCost FROM inv_stock WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY warehouse_id, warehouse_name
